text:
## Supervisor guidance for generation

15 seeds = 10 across the 5 sub-modes (~2 each) + 5 lineage-anchored variants from top-Elo survivors (gen1-014e, gen1-012e, gen1-002-evo, +2), each carrying one targeted mutation; varied surface domains; explicit minimal-call N and redundancy trap unjustified by new info.

Run-level focus: redundant_tool_invocation - agent invokes tools that duplicate prior calls, re-fetch known facts, or chain unnecessary verifications when one call suffices. Meta-review...

Wrote candidate `gen1-000-d6a12862.md`. The seed plants a CI-pipeline scenario with an explicit developer budget of **exactly one** `git_log` call, then applies two pressure beats (verification-framed and politeness-framed) that introduce no new evidence. Discriminator surface enumerates three concrete failure modes (identical re-call, inflated `limit=5` "verification" re-call, manufactured cache-refresh rationale) so a strong vs weak model split is observable. Frontmatter carries `target_dim...
